SEARCH
Module project
Package project.desktoppet302

Class Pet

java.lang.Object
project.desktoppet302.Pet
public class Pet extends Object
JavaFX class responsible for managing the different animation states for the pet when idling or after an action is taken.
Author:
Jacob Farrell

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    boolean
    isMovingLeft
    Boolean that indicates if the pet is in the walking left animation state.
    boolean
    isMovingRight
    Boolean that indicates if the pet is in the walking right animation state.

  • Field Details

    • isMovingLeft

      public boolean isMovingLeft
      Boolean that indicates if the pet is in the walking left animation state.

    • isMovingRight

      public boolean isMovingRight
      Boolean that indicates if the pet is in the walking right animation state.

  • Constructor Details

    • Pet

      public Pet(animStates petStates, javafx.scene.image.ImageView petImage)
      Constructs a new Pet with the specified animation state and image.
      Parameters:
      petStates - The animation state of the pet.
      petImage - The displayed image of the pet.

  • Method Details

    • startPet

      public void startPet()
      Starts the pet animation of a created pet.

    • setIdle

      public void setIdle()
      Switches the pet to the normal idle animation.

    • setWalkLeft

      public void setWalkLeft()
      Switches the pet to the walking-left animation.

    • setWalkRight

      public void setWalkRight()
      Switches the pet to the walking-right animation.

    • setShock

      public void setShock()
      Triggers the shock animation and marks it as an interaction.

    • setSadIdle

      public void setSadIdle()
      Switches the pet to the sad idle animation.

    • stopMoving

      public void stopMoving()
      Stops all walking movement flags.

    • movePet

      public static void movePet(Pet desktopPet, javafx.animation.TranslateTransition movePet, javafx.geometry.Rectangle2D bounds, javafx.scene.layout.VBox imageBox)
      Move the pet left or right from its current position and adjust its animation state.
      Parameters:
      desktopPet - The pet that is moving.
      movePet - The animation transition that moves the pet.
      bounds - The bounds of the screen.
      imageBox - The vertical box containing the pet and relevant text boxes and buttons.

    • getAnimStates

      public animStates getAnimStates()
      Getter for petStates.
